name: Writing Assistant AI MCP
description: Content writing toolkit: headline generation, readability scoring, tone analysis, outline building, and plagiarism similarity checking. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_headlines
tools.description: Generate headline variations for a given topic. Returns multiple options

tools.name: score_readability
tools.description: Calculate readability metrics for text: Flesch Reading Ease, Flesch-Kincaid

tools.name: analyze_tone
tools.description: Analyze the tone and style of text. Detects formal, casual, academic,

tools.name: build_outline
tools.description: Build a structured content outline with sections, word allocations,

tools.name: check_similarity
tools.description: Check similarity between two texts using Jaccard, cosine, and trigram
